chart.title: Population growth rate
chart.subtitle: Annual population change determined by births, deaths, and migration, expressed as a percentage of the population. Future projections are based on the UN's medium scenario.

Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.descriptionShort: The annual rate at which the population is growing, expressed as a percentage.
descriptionKey: The growth rate combines births, deaths, and net migration. The [natural population growth rate](https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/natural-population-growth) reflects only the balance of births and deaths.
Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.citationShort: UN, World Population Prospects (2024) – processed by Our World in Data
Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.citationLong: UN, World Population Prospects (2024) – processed by Our World in Data. “Population growth rate – UN WPP” [dataset]. United Nations, “World Population Prospects”; United Nations, “World Population Prospects - Interim Update” [original data].

Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.titleLong: Population growth rate - UN WPP – with medium scenario projections
Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.descriptionShort: The annual rate at which the population is growing, expressed as a percentage.  Future projections are based on the UN's medium scenario.
descriptionKey: The growth rate combines births, deaths, and net migration. The [natural population growth rate](https://ourworldindata.org/grapher/natural-population-growth) reflects only the balance of births and deaths.
Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.citationShort: UN, World Population Prospects (2024) – processed by Our World in Data
Population growth rate - Sex: all - Age:.citationLong: UN, World Population Prospects (2024) – processed by Our World in Data. “Population growth rate – UN WPP – with medium scenario projections” [dataset].
